commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is indicated because no blocking defect was found; the remaining action is maintainer validation and risk acceptance for Gateway startup concurrency.; Cleared: The diff only changes Gateway startup scheduling and tests; it does not add dependencies, CI execution, secrets handling, permissions, or a new network/security boundary. commands.review_summary:
This PR overlaps Gateway post-attach startup work by starting plugin services earlier, running startup logging alongside sidecar startup, preserving deferred plugin-service handles, and adding focused lifecycle tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level ordering claim: current main serializes startup logging before sidecars and plugin services after channel startup. I did not run a benchmark during this read-only review, but the PR body includes after-patch live Gateway output.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated because no blocking defect was found; the remaining action is maintainer validation and risk acceptance for Gateway startup concurrency.
